failure_reason: Raised the fourth-arm floor by fixing fkwu universal table loading for large fks images. form-mut's table is 283601 bytes, so the old 262143-byte read truncated the string pool tail and made direct string literal lengths read as zero. Increasing the emitted table-loader buffer/read limit to 1 MiB makes form-mut pass 31 four-way; the manifest gate prints PASS-4WAY form-mut; full validation remains diagnostic rc=1 with fourth arm: 105 band(s) four-way, 540 ok, and 4 unrelated divergent bands.
